'''Tom Keith''', ([[December 21]], [[1940s#1946|1946]]—[[October 30]], [[2011]]) was a [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] who provided voices and sound effects for over thirty years. Keith was known in part for appearing on [[Wikipedia:A Prairie Home Companion|A Prairie Home Companion]], a weekly two-hour comedy and music show that was broadcast over public radio.<ref name="Nytime Obit" />

Keith joined the ''[[Star Wars]]'' franchise in [[1998]] to voice various characters such as [[Jerg]] and [[Rolanda Gron]] in the ''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces (novellas)|Dark Forces]]'' audio dramas: ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|Rebel Agent]]'' and ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|Jedi Knight]]''.<ref name="Dark Forces">[[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|''Dark Forces'' audio dramas]]</ref> In [[1999]], Keith provided additional voices for the [[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|audio dramatization]] of ''[[Crimson Empire]]''.<ref name="Crimson Empire">[[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|''Crimson Empire'' audio drama]]</ref>
